title: The Gate of Justice Looms
description: The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. The battle shifts when train cars are disconnected, forcing Sanji, Franky, and the others to react quickly.
